case_title: GLENLEE TERRACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION. VS TWO THOUSAND SIX WASHINGTON STREET, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GLENLEE TERRACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION. AS TO DEFENDANT TWO THOUSAND SIX WASHINGTON STREET, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF'S DECLARATION:DEFT.WAS NOT SERVED. REQUEST FOR 1/7/04 10AM HEARING.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-26-2003, OFF CALENDAR
PER PLFTS DECLARATION, CHANGE NAME OF INDIVIDUAL TO A BUSINESS.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-16-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TWO THOUSAND SIX WASHINGTON STREET, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLENLEE TERRACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TWO THOUSAND SIX WASHINGTON STREET, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TWO THOUSAND SIX WASHINGTON STREET, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-16-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-14-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLTF TO BRIEF AND SERVE ISSUE OF DEFT'S LIABILITY FOR PRO-RATED SHARE OF PLTF'S PIPE REPLACEMENT. DEFT MAY REPLY & SERVE PLTF.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TWO THOUSAND SIX WASHINGTON STREET, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-07-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-20-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-07-2004, OFF CALENDAR OFF CAL; PLTF. TO RE-SET AND RE-SERVE CLAIM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-20-2004, OFF CALENDAR PLTF TO RE-SET & RE-SERVE; OTHER JACKSON ST OWNERS TO JOIN SUIT
